item.title: Hello World - Welcome to My Blog
item.description:
Welcome!

Hello and welcome to my blog! I’m Lakshmi Sobha, a Process Development Manager and Project Manager.

I’ve created this space to share my thoughts on:

  • Process improvement — strategies and frameworks that drive efficiency
  • Project management — lessons learned from leading cross-functional teams
  • Technology — tools and techniques that make our work better

Why Blog?

I believe in the power of sharing knowledge. Writing helps me clarify my thinking, and I hope my posts can help others navigate similar challenges in their own careers.
